V0200A11B Fall Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Falls care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
586 V0200A12A_NTRNT_CTR_CD V0200A12A_NTRNT_CTR_CD V0200A12A Nutritional Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Nutritional Status CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
587 V0200A12B_NTRNT_CPL_CD
